title: Cluster spec for Phase 4 fan-out
description: clusters.json is derived in Phase 2 from concentration data and consumed by Phase 4. Each cluster becomes one sub-agent investigation that produces one advisory at agents/<NN>-<slug>.md. The orchestrator fans out N parallel sub-agents (one per cluster) in a single message.

repo_cache_root.description: Absolute path to the shared repo cache populated by Phase 3 (repo-primer). Each cluster's repos are read from <repo_cache_root>/<repo_name>/.

id.description: Two-digit ordinal, e.g. "01". Determines advisory filename: agents/<id>-<slug>.md.

slug.description: Lowercase kebab-case fragment for the advisory filename, e.g. "frenchfines-modernization".

name.description: Human-readable cluster name shown in the rendered deliverables.

cve_count.description: Total critical CVEs in this cluster across all repos. The sum of cve_count across all clusters should equal exec_summary.today (modulo de-duplication noted in rationale).

primary_source.description: Where the criticals come from. Drives investigation depth.

primary_package.description: If most CVEs share a package (e.g. "axios", "openssl"), name it here. Optional.

rationale.description: Why these repos+CVEs are grouped. Read by the sub-agent so it knows what to look for.

blocked_by.description: Known blocking tickets at derivation time. Sub-agent may add more.
